name: Impacket PsExec Execution Detected
description: PsExec execution via Impacket has been detected, indicating potential lateral movement or post-exploitation activity.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the named pipe access event.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user who attempted or performed the named pipe access.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname where the named pipe access was detected.

parameters.name: ShareName
parameters.description: The name of the shared resource accessed ('IPC$').

parameters.name: RelativeTargetName
parameters.description: The name of the specific named pipe accessed (e.g., 'RemCom_stdint').

parameters.name: SourceAddress
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the access originated.

parameters.name: AccessMask
parameters.description: The access mask indicating requested/granted permissions.
